business_ideas.idea: Christian media company engaging Gen Z via social (not just church).
Digital tithing app (Venmo for churches); process $4B annually now.
Church merchandise and branded goods (preacher sneakers, apparel).
Beautiful Bibles: coffee table design editions like Kinfolk magazine.
Simplify Bible content for kids; distill anecdotes for engagement.
Capitalize on idle Uber/Lyft driver time with revenue streams.
Interactive ad network for Uber drivers (similar to Octopus).
Music promotion platform via Uber/Lyft drivers as captive audience.
Cloud kitchens for food influencers (Clout Kitchens).
Influencer restaurant chains (Gordon Ramsay model but for influencers).

predictions.text: 40M net new Christians join annually; 3.3B by 2050.
Cloud kitchens have $5k startup vs $500k for traditional restaurants.
